role_summary: the cao is responsible for all accounting policies, financial reporting accuracy, an d  compliance with accounting standards.
responsibilities: • define and maintain accounting policies and standards   • ensure accurate financial reporting and disclosures   • oversee accounting operations and teams   • manage statutory and internal audits   • ensure comp liance with ind as / ifrs / gaap   • support cfo and board on accounting matters
qualifications: • qualified ca   • deep expertise in accounting standards and reporting   • strong governance and control orientation         taxation roles (direct & indirect tax)
